1	---
     2	name: eino-agent
     3	description: Eino ADK agent construction, middleware, and runner. Use when a user needs to build an AI Agent, configure ChatModelAgent with ReAct pattern, use middleware (filesystem, tool search, tool reduction, summarization, plan-task, skill), set up the Runner for event-driven execution, implement human-in-the-loop with interrupt/resume, or wrap agents as tools. Covers ChatModelAgent and DeepAgents.
     4	---
     5	
     6	# Eino ADK Overview
     7	
     8	Import: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk`
     9	
    10	The Agent Development Kit (ADK) provides a framework for building agents in Go. Core interface:
    11	
    12	```go
    13	type Agent interface {
    14	    Name(ctx context.Context) string
    15	    Description(ctx context.Context) string
    16	    Run(ctx context.Context, input *AgentInput, opts ...AgentRunOption) *AsyncIterator[*AgentEvent]
    17	}
    18	```
    19	
    20	# Agent Types
    21	
    22	| Type | Description | Decision |
    23	|------|-------------|----------|
    24	| ChatModelAgent | ReAct pattern: LLM reasons, calls tools, loops until done | Dynamic (LLM) |
    25	| DeepAgent | Pre-built agent with planning, filesystem, sub-agents | Dynamic (LLM) |
    26	| Custom Agent | Implement the Agent interface directly | Custom |
    27	
    28	# ChatModelAgent Quick Start
    29	
    30	```go
    31	import (
    32	    "context"
    33	    "fmt"
    34	    "log"
    35	
    36	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai"
    37	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
    38	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool"
    39	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils"
    40	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose"
    41	)
    42	
    43	func main() {
    44	    ctx := context.Background()
    45	
    46	    // 1. Create a tool
    47	    searchTool, _ := utils.InferTool("search_book", "Search books by genre",
    48	        func(ctx context.Context, input *struct {
    49	            Genre string `json:"genre" jsonschema_description:"Book genre"`
    50	        }) (string, error) {
    51	            return `{"books": ["The Great Gatsby"]}`, nil
    52	        })
    53	
    54	    // 2. Create model
    55	    cm, _ := openai.NewChatModel(ctx, &openai.ChatModelConfig{
    56	        APIKey: "your-key", Model: "gpt-4o",
    57	    })
    58	
    59	    // 3. Create agent
    60	    agent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
    61	        Name:        "BookRecommender",
    62	        Description: "Recommends books",
    63	        Instruction: "You recommend books using the search_book tool.",
    64	        Model:       cm,
    65	        ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{
    66	            ToolsNodeConfig: compose.ToolsNodeConfig{
    67	                Tools: []tool.BaseTool{searchTool},
    68	            },
    69	        },
    70	    })
    71	
    72	    // 4. Run with Runner
    73	    runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{Agent: agent})
    74	    iter := runner.Query(ctx, "recommend a fiction book")
    75	    for {
    76	        event, ok := iter.Next()
    77	        if !ok {
    78	            break
    79	        }
    80	        if event.Err != nil {
    81	            log.Fatal(event.Err)
    82	        }
    83	        msg, _ := event.Output.MessageOutput.GetMessage()
    84	        fmt.Printf("Agent[%s]: %v\n", event.AgentName, msg)
    85	    }
    86	}
    87	```
    88	
    89	# Runner
    90	
    91	The Runner manages agent lifecycle, context passing, and interrupt/resume:
    92	
    93	```go
    94	runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{
    95	    Agent:           myAgent,
    96	    EnableStreaming:  true,
    97	    CheckPointStore: myStore,  // for interrupt/resume
    98	})
    99	
   100	// Query (convenience for single user message)
   101	iter := runner.Query(ctx, "hello")
   102	
   103	// Run (full control over input messages)
   104	iter := runner.Run(ctx, []adk.Message{schema.UserMessage("hello")})
   105	```
   106	
   107	# Middleware System
   108	
   109	Middleware extends ChatModelAgent behavior. Configure via `Handlers` field:
   110	
   111	```go
   112	agent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   113	    // ...
   114	    Handlers: []adk.ChatModelAgentMiddleware{fsMiddleware, summarizationMW},
   115	})
   116	```
   117	
   118	Seven built-in middleware types (see reference/middleware.md for details):
   119	
   120	| Middleware | Package | Purpose |
   121	|-----------|---------|---------|
   122	| FileSystem | `adk/middlewares/filesystem` | File ops (read/write/edit/glob/grep) + shell |
   123	| ToolSearch | `adk/middlewares/dynamictool/toolsearch` | Dynamic tool selection via regex search |
   124	| ToolReduction | `adk/middlewares/reduction` | Truncate/clear large tool results |
   125	| Summarization | `adk/middlewares/summarization` | Compress long conversation history |
   126	| PlanTask | `adk/middlewares/plantask` | Task creation and progress tracking |
   127	| Skill | `adk/middlewares/skill` | Skill-based progressive disclosure |
   128	| PatchToolCalls | `adk/middlewares/patchtoolcalls` | Fix dangling tool calls in history |
   129	
   130	# AgentAsTool
   131	
   132	Wrap any Agent as a Tool for use by another agent:
   133	
   134	```go
   135	subAgent := createMySubAgent()
   136	agentTool := adk.NewAgentTool(ctx, subAgent)
   137	
   138	parentAgent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   139	    ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{
   140	        ToolsNodeConfig: compose.ToolsNodeConfig{
   141	            Tools: []tool.BaseTool{agentTool},
   142	        },
   143	    },
   144	})
   145	```
   146	
   147	# Human-in-the-Loop
   148	
   149	ChatModelAgent supports interrupt and resume for human approval, clarification, and feedback. See reference/human-in-the-loop.md for details.
   150	
   151	Key pattern: tool returns `compose.NewInterruptAndRerunErr(info)` to pause, then `runner.ResumeWithParams(ctx, checkpointID, params)` to continue.
   152	
   153	# Instructions to Agent
   154	
   155	- Default to `ChatModelAgent` for most use cases (single agent with tools)
   156	- Use `Runner` to execute agents -- never call `agent.Run()` directly in production
   157	- Middleware order matters: PatchToolCalls first, then Summarization, then Reduction
   158	- Use `DeepAgent` (`adk/prebuilt/deep`) when you need built-in planning + filesystem + sub-agents
   159	- Use `AgentAsTool` or DeepAgents' SubAgents when a sub-agent needs isolated context (no shared history)
   160	
   161	## Reference Files
   162	
   163	Read these files on-demand for detailed API, examples, and advanced usage:
   164	
   165	- [reference/chat-model-agent.md](reference/chat-model-agent.md) -- ChatModelAgentConfig reference, ReAct pattern, ToolsConfig, streaming example
   166	- [reference/deep-agents.md](reference/deep-agents.md) -- DeepAgent concept, config, architecture, comparison with ChatModelAgent
   167	- [reference/middleware.md](reference/middleware.md) -- All 7 middleware types with interface, config, and examples
   168	- [reference/runner-and-events.md](reference/runner-and-events.md) -- Runner creation, AgentEvent/AgentOutput, event iteration patterns
   169	- [reference/agent-as-tool.md](reference/agent-as-tool.md) -- Wrapping an Agent as a Tool for use by another agent
   170	- [reference/human-in-the-loop.md](reference/human-in-the-loop.md) -- Interrupt APIs, ResumableAgent, CheckPointStore, resume patterns
   171	- [reference/filesystem.md](reference/filesystem.md) -- Filesystem Backend interface, Local and AgentKit implementations, usage with DeepAgent

1	ChatModelAgent is the core ADK agent that uses the ReAct pattern: LLM reasons, generates tool calls, executes tools, feeds results back, and loops until done.
     2	
     3	## Import
     4	
     5	```go
     6	import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
     7	```
     8	
     9	## ReAct Pattern
    10	
    11	1. Call ChatModel (Reason)
    12	2. LLM returns tool call requests (Action)
    13	3. ChatModelAgent executes tools (Act)
    14	4. Tool results fed back to ChatModel (Observation)
    15	5. Loop until ChatModel decides no more tool calls are needed
    16	
    17	When no tools are configured, ChatModelAgent degrades to a single ChatModel call.
    18	
    19	## ChatModelAgentConfig
    20	
    21	```go
    22	type ChatModelAgentConfig struct {
    23	    // Name of the agent. Should be unique across all agents.
    24	    Name string
    25	
    26	    // Description of capabilities. Helps other agents decide whether to delegate.
    27	    Description string
    28	
    29	    // Instruction used as system prompt. Supports f-string placeholders for session values:
    30	    // "The current time is {Time}. The user is {User}."
    31	    Instruction string
    32	
    33	    // The LLM model. Must support tool calling.
    34	    Model model.ToolCallingChatModel
    35	
    36	    // Tool configuration
    37	    ToolsConfig ToolsConfig
    38	
    39	    // Custom function to transform instruction + input into model messages.
    40	    // Optional. Defaults to prepending instruction as system message.
    41	    GenModelInput GenModelInput
    42	
    43	    // Exit tool. When called, agent terminates immediately.
    44	    // Use the built-in ExitTool: adk.ExitTool{}
    45	    Exit tool.BaseTool
    46	
    47	    // Max ReAct iterations. Default: 20. Agent errors if exceeded.
    48	    MaxIterations int
    49	
    50	    // Retry config for ChatModel failures. Optional.
    51	    ModelRetryConfig *ModelRetryConfig
    52	
    53	    // Middleware list
    54	    Handlers []ChatModelAgentMiddleware
    55	}
    56	```
    57	
    58	## ToolsConfig
    59	
    60	```go
    61	type ToolsConfig struct {
    62	    compose.ToolsNodeConfig
    63	
    64	    // Tools whose results cause the agent to return immediately (skip further ReAct loops).
    65	    ReturnDirectly map[string]bool
    66	
    67	    // When true, internal events from AgentTool sub-agents are emitted to the parent.
    68	    EmitInternalEvents bool
    69	}
    70	```
    71	
    72	`ToolsNodeConfig` comes from `github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose`:
    73	
    74	```go
    75	type ToolsNodeConfig struct {
    76	    Tools              []tool.BaseTool
    77	    ToolCallMiddlewares []compose.ToolCallMiddleware
    78	}
    79	```
    80	
    81	## Creating Tools
    82	
    83	Use `utils.InferTool` for quick tool creation:
    84	
    85	```go
    86	import (
    87	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils"
    88	)
    89	
    90	type SearchInput struct {
    91	    Query string `json:"query" jsonschema_description:"Search query"`
    92	}
    93	
    94	type SearchOutput struct {
    95	    Results []string `json:"results"`
    96	}
    97	
    98	searchTool, err := utils.InferTool("web_search", "Search the web",
    99	    func(ctx context.Context, input *SearchInput) (*SearchOutput, error) {
   100	        return &SearchOutput{Results: []string{"result1"}}, nil
   101	    })
   102	```
   103	
   104	For tools that accept options (needed for interrupt/resume):
   105	
   106	```go
   107	optionableTool, err := utils.InferOptionableTool("ask_user", "Ask user for input",
   108	    func(ctx context.Context, input *AskInput, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {
   109	        o := tool.GetImplSpecificOptions[myOptions](nil, opts...)
   110	        if o.NewInput == nil {
   111	            return "", compose.NewInterruptAndRerunErr(input.Question)
   112	        }
   113	        return *o.NewInput, nil
   114	    })
   115	```
   116	
   117	## Complete Example with Streaming
   118	
   119	```go
   120	import (
   121	    "context"
   122	    "fmt"
   123	    "io"
   124	    "log"
   125	
   126	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai"
   127	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
   128	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool"
   129	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils"
   130	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose"
   131	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema"
   132	)
   133	
   134	func main() {
   135	    ctx := context.Background()
   136	
   137	    // Create model
   138	    cm, _ := openai.NewChatModel(ctx, &openai.ChatModelConfig{
   139	        APIKey: "your-key", Model: "gpt-4o",
   140	    })
   141	
   142	    // Create tools
   143	    weatherTool, _ := utils.InferTool("get_weather", "Get weather for a city",
   144	        func(ctx context.Context, input *struct {
   145	            City string `json:"city" jsonschema_description:"City name"`
   146	        }) (string, error) {
   147	            return fmt.Sprintf("25C in %s", input.City), nil
   148	        })
   149	
   150	    calcTool, _ := utils.InferTool("calculator", "Basic math operations",
   151	        func(ctx context.Context, input *struct {
   152	            Expression string `json:"expression" jsonschema_description:"Math expression"`
   153	        }) (string, error) {
   154	            return "42", nil
   155	        })
   156	
   157	    // Create agent
   158	    agent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   159	        Name:        "Assistant",
   160	        Description: "A helpful assistant with weather and calculator tools",
   161	        Instruction: "You are a helpful assistant. Use tools when needed.",
   162	        Model:       cm,
   163	        ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{
   164	            ToolsNodeConfig: compose.ToolsNodeConfig{
   165	                Tools: []tool.BaseTool{weatherTool, calcTool},
   166	            },
   167	        },
   168	        MaxIterations: 10,
   169	    })
   170	
   171	    // Run with streaming
   172	    runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{
   173	        Agent:          agent,
   174	        EnableStreaming: true,
   175	    })
   176	
   177	    iter := runner.Query(ctx, "What's the weather in Tokyo?")
   178	    for {
   179	        event, ok := iter.Next()
   180	        if !ok {
   181	            break
   182	        }
   183	        if event.Err != nil {
   184	            log.Fatal(event.Err)
   185	        }
   186	
   187	        if event.Output != nil && event.Output.MessageOutput != nil {
   188	            mv := event.Output.MessageOutput
   189	            if mv.IsStreaming {
   190	                // Handle streaming response
   191	                for {
   192	                    msg, err := mv.MessageStream.Recv()
   193	                    if err == io.EOF {
   194	                        break
   195	                    }
   196	                    if err != nil {
   197	                        log.Fatal(err)
   198	                    }
   199	                    fmt.Print(msg.Content)
   200	                }
   201	                fmt.Println()
   202	            } else {
   203	                // Handle non-streaming response
   204	                fmt.Printf("[%s] %s\n", mv.Role, mv.Message.Content)
   205	            }
   206	        }
   207	    }
   208	}
   209	```
   210	
   211	## Middleware
   212	
   213	Add middleware via the `Handlers` field:
   214	
   215	```go
   216	agent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   217	    // ...
   218	    Handlers: []adk.ChatModelAgentMiddleware{
   219	        patchToolCallsMW,
   220	        summarizationMW,
   221	        filesystemMW,
   222	    },
   223	})
   224	```
   225	
   226	## ModelRetryConfig
   227	
   228	Configure automatic retry on model failures:
   229	
   230	```go
   231	agent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   232	    // ...
   233	    ModelRetryConfig: &adk.ModelRetryConfig{
   234	        MaxRetries: 3,
   235	        // Additional retry policy fields...
   236	    },
   237	})
   238	```
   239	
   240	When a streaming response fails and will be retried, the stream returns a `WillRetryError`. Handle it to show retry status to the user.
   241	
   242	## SessionValues
   243	
   244	SessionValues provide cross-agent key-value storage within a single run:
   245	
   246	```go
   247	// Set before running
   248	runner.Run(ctx, msgs, adk.WithSessionValues(map[string]any{"user": "Alice"}))
   249	
   250	// Access in Instruction via f-string
   251	Instruction: "The current user is {user}."
   252	```

1	DeepAgent is a pre-built agent on top of ChatModelAgent that provides planning, filesystem access, shell execution, and sub-agent delegation out of the box.
     2	
     3	## Import
     4	
     5	Requires eino >= v0.5.14:
     6	
     7	```go
     8	import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
     9	```
    10	
    11	## When to Use
    12	
    13	Use DeepAgent instead of plain ChatModelAgent when you need:
    14	
    15	- Built-in task planning (WriteTodos tool)
    16	- File system operations (read/write/edit/glob/grep)
    17	- Shell command execution
    18	- Sub-agent delegation with context isolation
    19	- Auto-summarization for long conversations
    20	
    21	Use plain ChatModelAgent when:
    22	
    23	- You need fine-grained control over tools and prompts
    24	- The task is simple (single tool, no planning needed)
    25	- You want to minimize token cost (DeepAgent's planning adds overhead)
    26	
    27	## Architecture
    28	
    29	```
    30	MainAgent (ChatModelAgent + built-in tools + prompt)
    31	    |
    32	    +-- WriteTodos tool (task planning)
    33	    +-- Built-in tools (read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, execute)
    34	    +-- TaskTool -> SubAgents
    35	            |
    36	            +-- GeneralPurpose (same tools as main, no TaskTool)
    37	            +-- Custom SubAgents
    38	```
    39	
    40	- MainAgent receives user input, plans via WriteTodos, delegates via TaskTool
    41	- SubAgents have isolated context (no shared history with MainAgent)
    42	- GeneralPurpose sub-agent is added by default for generic tasks
    43	
    44	## Configuration
    45	
    46	```go
    47	type Config struct {
    48	    // Required: the LLM model
    49	    Model model.ToolCallingChatModel
    50	
    51	    // Optional: filesystem backend for file operations
    52	    Backend filesystem.Backend
    53	
    54	    // Optional: shell execution (mutually exclusive with StreamingShell)
    55	    Shell filesystem.Shell
    56	
    57	    // Optional: streaming shell execution
    58	    StreamingShell filesystem.StreamingShell
    59	
    60	    // Optional: custom tools added to the main agent
    61	    Tools []tool.BaseTool
    62	
    63	    // Optional: custom sub-agents
    64	    SubAgents []adk.Agent
    65	
    66	    // Optional: custom system prompt (appended to built-in prompt)
    67	    Instruction string
    68	
    69	    // Optional: disable WriteTodos tool
    70	    WithoutWriteTodos bool
    71	
    72	    // Optional: disable the default general-purpose sub-agent
    73	    WithoutGeneralSubAgent bool
    74	
    75	    // Optional: custom TaskTool description generator
    76	    TaskToolDescriptionGenerator func(ctx context.Context, agents []adk.Agent) string
    77	
    78	    // Optional: middleware
    79	    Handlers []adk.ChatModelAgentMiddleware
    80	}
    81	```
    82	
    83	## Quick Start
    84	
    85	```go
    86	import (
    87	    "context"
    88	    "fmt"
    89	    "log"
    90	
    91	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai"
    92	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
    93	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/filesystem"
    94	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
    95	)
    96	
    97	func main() {
    98	    ctx := context.Background()
    99	
   100	    cm, _ := openai.NewChatModel(ctx, &openai.ChatModelConfig{
   101	        APIKey: "your-key", Model: "gpt-4o",
   102	    })
   103	
   104	    backend := filesystem.NewInMemoryBackend()
   105	
   106	    agent, err := deep.New(ctx, &deep.Config{
   107	        Model:   cm,
   108	        Backend: backend,
   109	    })
   110	    if err != nil {
   111	        log.Fatal(err)
   112	    }
   113	
   114	    runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{Agent: agent})
   115	    iter := runner.Query(ctx, "Analyze the CSV file at /data/sales.csv and create a summary report")
   116	
   117	    for {
   118	        event, ok := iter.Next()
   119	        if !ok {
   120	            break
   121	        }
   122	        if event.Err != nil {
   123	            log.Fatal(event.Err)
   124	        }
   125	        if event.Output != nil && event.Output.MessageOutput != nil {
   126	            msg, _ := event.Output.MessageOutput.GetMessage()
   127	            fmt.Printf("[%s] %s\n", event.AgentName, msg.Content)
   128	        }
   129	    }
   130	}
   131	```
   132	
   133	## Built-in Capabilities
   134	
   135	### WriteTodos
   136	
   137	A planning tool that lets the agent create and track a structured task list. The agent calls WriteTodos to decompose complex tasks, then updates progress as it works.
   138	
   139	Disable with `WithoutWriteTodos: true`.
   140	
   141	### File System Tools
   142	
   143	When `Backend` is configured, the agent gets: `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `glob`, `grep`.
   144	
   145	When `Shell` or `StreamingShell` is configured, the agent also gets: `execute`.
   146	
   147	### Task Delegation (TaskTool)
   148	
   149	When `SubAgents` are configured (or the default general-purpose sub-agent is enabled), the agent gets a `task` tool. The agent specifies which sub-agent to call and what task to perform.
   150	
   151	Sub-agents run in isolated context -- they only receive the task description, not the full conversation history.
   152	
   153	## Comparison with Other Patterns
   154	
   155	| Feature | DeepAgent | Plain ReAct | Plan-Execute |
   156	|---------|-----------|-------------|--------------|
   157	| Planning | Built-in (WriteTodos) | Manual | Separate planner agent |
   158	| Context isolation | Yes (sub-agents) | No | Depends |
   159	| Token cost | Higher (planning overhead) | Lower | Higher (separate plan) |
   160	| Model requirements | Higher (must plan well) | Lower | Medium |

   200	type LoggerCallback struct {
   201		callbacks.HandlerBuilder // 可以用 callbacks.HandlerBuilder 来辅助实现 callback
   202	}
   203	
   204	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnStart(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo, input callbacks.CallbackInput) context.Context {
   205		fmt.Println("==================")
   206		inputStr, _ := json.MarshalIndent(input, "", "  ")
   207		fmt.Printf("[OnStart] %s\n", string(inputStr))
   208		return ctx
   209	}
   210	
   211	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnEnd(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo, output callbacks.CallbackOutput) context.Context {
   212		fmt.Println("=========[OnEnd]=========")
   213		outputStr, _ := json.MarshalIndent(output, "", "  ")
   214		fmt.Println(string(outputStr))
   215		return ctx
   216	}
   217	
   218	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnError(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo, err error) context.Context {
   219		fmt.Println("=========[OnError]=========")
   220		fmt.Println(err)
   221		return ctx
   222	}
   223	
   224	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnEndWithStreamOutput(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo,
   225		output *schema.StreamReader[callbacks.CallbackOutput],
   226	) context.Context {
   227		graphInfoName := react.GraphName
   228	
   229		go func() {
   230			defer func() {
   231				if err := recover(); err != nil {
   232					fmt.Println("[OnEndStream] panic err:", err)
   233				}
   234			}()
   235	
   236			defer output.Close() // remember to close the stream in defer
   237	
   238			fmt.Println("=========[OnEndStream]=========")
   239			for {
   240				frame, err := output.Recv()
   241				if errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
   242					// finish
   243					break
   244				}
   245				if err != nil {
   246					fmt.Printf("internal error: %s\n", err)
   247					return
   248				}
   249	
   250				s, err := json.Marshal(frame)
   251				if err != nil {
   252					fmt.Printf("internal error: %s\n", err)
   253					return
   254				}
   255	
   256				if info.Name == graphInfoName { // 仅打印 graph 的输出, 否则每个 stream 节点的输出都会打印一遍
   257					fmt.Printf("%s: %s\n", info.Name, string(s))
   258				}
   259			}
   260		}()
   261		return ctx
   262	}
   263	
   264	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnStartWithStreamInput(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo,
   265		input *schema.StreamReader[callbacks.CallbackInput],
   266	) context.Context {
   267		defer input.Close()
   268		return ctx
   269	}

   177	
   178		logs.Infof("\n\n===== start streaming =====\n\n")
   179	
   180		for {
   181			msg, err := sr.Recv()
   182			if err != nil {
   183				if errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {

   200	type LoggerCallback struct {
   201		callbacks.HandlerBuilder // 可以用 callbacks.HandlerBuilder 来辅助实现 callback
   202	}
   203	
   204	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnStart(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo, input callbacks.CallbackInput) context.Context {
   205		fmt.Println("==================")
   206		inputStr, _ := json.MarshalIndent(input, "", "  ")
   207		fmt.Printf("[OnStart] %s\n", string(inputStr))
   208		return ctx
   209	}
   210	
   211	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnEnd(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo, output callbacks.CallbackOutput) context.Context {
   212		fmt.Println("=========[OnEnd]=========")
   213		outputStr, _ := json.MarshalIndent(output, "", "  ")
   214		fmt.Println(string(outputStr))
   215		return ctx
   216	}
   217	
   218	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnError(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo, err error) context.Context {
   219		fmt.Println("=========[OnError]=========")
   220		fmt.Println(err)
   221		return ctx
   222	}
   223	
   224	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnEndWithStreamOutput(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo,
   225		output *schema.StreamReader[callbacks.CallbackOutput],
   226	) context.Context {
   227		graphInfoName := react.GraphName
   228	
   229		go func() {
   230			defer func() {
   231				if err := recover(); err != nil {
   232					fmt.Println("[OnEndStream] panic err:", err)
   233				}
   234			}()
   235	
   236			defer output.Close() // remember to close the stream in defer
   237	
   238			fmt.Println("=========[OnEndStream]=========")
   239			for {
   240				frame, err := output.Recv()
   241				if errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
   242					// finish
   243					break
   244				}
   245				if err != nil {
   246					fmt.Printf("internal error: %s\n", err)
   247					return
   248				}
   249	
   250				s, err := json.Marshal(frame)
   251				if err != nil {
   252					fmt.Printf("internal error: %s\n", err)
   253					return
   254				}
   255	
   256				if info.Name == graphInfoName { // 仅打印 graph 的输出, 否则每个 stream 节点的输出都会打印一遍
   257					fmt.Printf("%s: %s\n", info.Name, string(s))
   258				}
   259			}
   260		}()
   261		return ctx
   262	}
   263	
   264	func (cb *LoggerCallback) OnStartWithStreamInput(ctx context.Context, info *callbacks.RunInfo,
   265		input *schema.StreamReader[callbacks.CallbackInput],
   266	) context.Context {
   267		defer input.Close()
   268		return ctx
   269	}

现在我对内置 Agent 有了全面的了解。让我为你整理：

---

## 一、ADK 包内置 Agent

ADK (Agent Development Kit) 包提供了现代化的 Agent 构建框架：

### 1. ChatModelAgent

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk`

**功能**: 基于 ReAct 模式的智能 Agent，核心能力：
- LLM 推理 → 工具调用 → 循环执行直到完成
- 支持中间件扩展（FileSystem、Summarization、PlanTask 等）
- 支持人机交互

```go
agent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
    Name:        "MyAgent",
    Description: "Agent description",
    Instruction: "System prompt",
    Model:       chatModel,
    ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{...},
    Handlers:    []adk.ChatModelAgentMiddleware{...}, // 中间件
})
```

---

### 2. DeepAgent（预构建 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep`

**功能**: 功能丰富的预构建 Agent，内置：
- **WriteTodos**: 任务规划和跟踪
- **FileSystem**: 文件系统操作（读/写/编辑/glob/grep/shell）
- **SubAgent**: 子 Agent 能力

```go
agent, _ := deep.New(ctx, &deep.Config{
    Model:   chatModel,
    Backend: filesystem.NewInMemoryBackend(),
    WithoutWriteTodos: false, // 可禁用任务规划
})
```

---

## 二、Flow 包内置 Agent

Flow 包提供了更多底层的 Agent 实现：

### 1. ReactAgent（ReAct 模式 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/react`

**功能**: 经典的 ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) Agent：
- 推理 → 行动 → 观察 → 循环
- 适合简单工具调用场景

```go
import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/react"

agent, _ := react.NewAgent(ctx, &react.AgentConfig{
    Model: chatModel,
    Tools: []tool.BaseTool{tool1, tool2},
})

// 运行
result, _ := agent.Run(ctx, "your question")
```

---

### 2. PlanExecuteAgent（规划执行 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/plan_execute`

**功能**: 先规划后执行的多步骤 Agent：
1. **Plan 阶段**: 将复杂任务分解为子任务列表
2. **Execute 阶段**: 依次执行每个子任务
3. **Replan 阶段**: 根据执行结果重新规划（可选）

```go
import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/plan_execute"

// 构建计划器
planner := plan_execute.NewPlanner(chatModel, tools)

// 构建执行器  
executor := plan_execute.NewExecutor(chatModel, tools)

// 组合成 Agent
agent := plan_execute.NewAgent(planner, executor)
```

**适用场景**: 复杂多步骤任务，如数据分析、报告生成等

---

### 3. HostMultiAgent（主从多 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/host`

**功能**: 主 Agent + 专家 Agent 的协作模式：
- **Host**: 中央协调器，负责理解意图并分配任务
- **Specialist**: 专业 Agent，各自负责特定领域

```go
import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/host"

hostMA, _ := host.NewMultiAgent(ctx, &host.MultiAgentConfig{
    Host: host.Host{
        ChatModel:    chatModel,
        SystemPrompt: "You are a coordinator...",
    },
    Specialists: []*host.Specialist{
        {
            Name:        "Writer",
            Description: "Writes journal entries",
            Agent:       writerAgent, // 可以是任意 Agent 实现
        },
        {
            Name:        "Reader", 
            Description: "Reads journal entries",
            Agent:       readerAgent,
        },
    },
})
```

**适用场景**: 需要多领域专家协作的复杂任务，如日记助手、代码审查等

---

## 三、Agent 对比总结

| Agent | 包 | 模式 | 适用场景 | 复杂度 |
|-------|-----|------|---------|--------|
| **ChatModelAgent** | adk | ReAct | 通用 Agent + 工具调用 | ⭐⭐ |
| **DeepAgent** | adk/prebuilt | ReAct + 规划 + 文件系统 | 复杂任务、需要持久化 | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| **ReactAgent** | flow/agent/react | ReAct | 简单工具调用 | ⭐ |
| **PlanExecuteAgent** | flow/agent/multiagent | Plan → Execute → Replan | 多步骤复杂任务 | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| **HostMultiAgent** | flow/agent/multiagent | Host + Specialists | 多领域协作 | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |

---

## 四、选择建议

| 场景 | 推荐 Agent |
|------|-----------|
| 简单问答 + 工具调用 | ReactAgent 或 ChatModelAgent |
| 需要中间件扩展 | ChatModelAgent |
| 需要文件系统 + 任务规划 | DeepAgent |
| 复杂多步骤任务 | PlanExecuteAgent |
| 多领域专家协作 | HostMultiAgent |
| 需要人机交互 | ChatModelAgent + 中间件 |

---

## 五、架构关系图

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        ADK 包 (现代框架)                      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ChatModelAgent ──────────────────> 中间件扩展               │
│       │                              ├── FileSystem         │
│       │                              ├── Summarization       │
│       │                              ├── PlanTask            │
│       │                              └── ToolSearch          │
│       │                                                      │
│       └──> AgentTool (包装为工具)                             │
│                                                              │
│  DeepAgent (预构建)                                           │
│       ├── WriteTodos (任务规划)                               │
│       ├── FileSystem (文件操作)                               │
│       └── SubAgent (子 Agent)                                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                       Flow 包 (底层实现)                      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ReactAgent ──────> 经典 ReAct 循环                          │
│                                                              │
│  PlanExecuteAgent                                           │
│       ├── Planner (规划器)                                   │
│       ├── Executor (执行器)                                  │
│       └── Replanner (重规划器)                               │
│                                                              │
│  HostMultiAgent                                             │
│       ├── Host (中央协调器)                                  │
│       └── Specialists (专家 Agent 列表)                      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

1	# Human-in-the-Loop: Feedback Loop Pattern
     2	
     3	This example demonstrates a sophisticated "human-in-the-loop" pattern: **Feedback Loop**. It showcases a multi-agent workflow where one agent generates content, another agent requests human feedback, and the system supports iterative refinement based on that feedback.
     4	
     5	## How It Works
     6	
     7	This implementation uses a **multi-agent architecture** with two specialized agents working together:
     8	
     9	1. **Writer Agent**: A specialized agent that generates creative content (poems in this example). It produces the initial draft and can incorporate feedback to create revised versions.
    10	
    11	2. **Review Agent**: An agent that acts as a bridge between the Writer Agent and the human reviewer. It:
    12	   - Captures the content generated by the Writer Agent
    13	   - Triggers an interrupt to request human feedback
    14	   - Handles the resume process with human feedback
    15	   - Either passes the feedback to the Writer Agent or exits the loop if no edits are needed
    16	
    17	### Workflow Sequence
    18	
    19	1. **Initial Request**: The user requests content creation (e.g., "write a short poem about potato")
    20	2. **Content Generation**: The Writer Agent generates the initial content
    21	3. **Feedback Interrupt**: The Review Agent captures the content and triggers an interrupt, presenting it to the human for feedback
    22	4. **Human Feedback**: The human can either:
    23	   - Provide specific feedback for improvements
    24	   - Indicate "NO NEED TO EDIT" if the content is satisfactory
    25	5. **Resume and Iterate**: The system resumes with the human's feedback:
    26	   - If feedback is provided, the Writer Agent generates a revised version
    27	   - If "NO NEED TO EDIT" is selected, the workflow completes
    28	6. **Loop Continuation**: The process can repeat for multiple iterations of feedback and refinement
    29	
    30	## Key Features Demonstrated
    31	
    32	- **Multi-Agent Collaboration**: Shows how different agents can work together in a coordinated workflow
    33	- **Stateful Interrupts**: The Review Agent maintains state about the content being reviewed
    34	- **Iterative Refinement**: Supports multiple rounds of human feedback and content improvement
    35	- **Flexible Exit Conditions**: Allows the human to indicate when the content is satisfactory
    36	
    37	## How to Configure Environment Variables
    38	
    39	Before running the example, you need to set up the required environment variables for the LLM API. You have two options:
    40	
    41	### Option 1: OpenAI-Compatible Configuration
    42	```bash
    43	export OPENAI_API_KEY="{your api key}"
    44	export OPENAI_BASE_URL="{your model base url}"
    45	# Only configure this if you are using Azure-like LLM providers
    46	export OPENAI_BY_AZURE=true
    47	# 'gpt-4o' is just an example, configure the model name provided by your LLM provider
    48	export OPENAI_MODEL="gpt-4o-2024-05-13"
    49	```
    50	
    51	### Option 2: ARK Configuration
    52	```bash
    53	export MODEL_TYPE="ark"
    54	export ARK_API_KEY="{your ark api key}"
    55	export ARK_MODEL="{your ark model name}"
    56	```
    57	
    58	Alternatively, you can create a `.env` file in the project root with these variables.
    59	
    60	## How to Run
    61	
    62	Ensure you have your environment variables set (e.g., for the LLM API key). Then, run the following command from the root of the `eino-examples` repository:
    63	
    64	```sh
    65	go run ./adk/human-in-the-loop/3_feedback-loop
    66	```
    67	
    68	You will see:
    69	1. The Writer Agent generating a poem about potatoes
    70	2. A prompt asking for your feedback
    71	3. Options to either provide specific feedback or type "NO NEED TO EDIT"
    72	4. The system incorporating your feedback and generating revised content
    73	
    74	## Workflow Diagram
    75	
    76	```mermaid
    77	graph TD
    78	    A[User: Content Request] --> B{Writer Agent};
    79	    B --> C[Generates Content] --> D{Review Agent};
    80	    D --> E[Interrupt: Request Feedback] --> F{Human Feedback};
    81	    F -- "Provide Feedback" --> G[Targeted Resume: With Feedback] --> B;
    82	    F -- "NO NEED TO EDIT" --> H[Targeted Resume: No Edit Needed] --> I[Workflow Complete];
    83	    G --> C;
    84	```
    85	
    86	## Practical Example
    87	
    88	Here's a real trace from running the example, showing how the iterative feedback process works:
    89	
    90	```
    91	name: WriterAgent
    92	path: [{Writer MultiAgent} {WriterAgent}]
    93	answer: Hidden beneath earth's gentle fold,
    94	A humble potato, golden and bold.
    95	
    96	name: ReviewerAgent
    97	path: [{Writer Multi-Agent} {WriterAgent} {ReviewerAgent}]
    98	Original content to review:
    99	`
   100	Hidden beneath earth's gentle fold,
   101	A humble potato, golden and bold.
   102	`.
   103	If you think the content is good as it is, please reply with "No need to edit".
   104	Otherwise, please provide your feedback.
   105	
   106	your input here: Make it more funny.
   107	
   108	name: ReviewerAgent
   109	path: [{Writer Multi-Agent} {WriterAgent} {ReviewerAgent}]
   110	answer: Make it more funny.
   111	
   112	name: WriterAgent
   113	path: [{Writer Multi-Agent} {WriterAgent} {ReviewerAgent} {WriterAgent}]
   114	answer: I'm just a spud, not a fancy tomato,
   115	But mash me up, I'm a party potato!
   116	
   117	name: ReviewerAgent
   118	path: [{Writer Multi-Agent} {WriterAgent} {ReviewerAgent} {WriterAgent} {ReviewerAgent}]
   119	Original content to review:
   120	`
   121	I'm just a spud, not a fancy tomato,
   122	But mash me up, I'm a party potato!
   123	`.
   124	If you think the content is good as it is, please reply with "No need to edit".
   125	Otherwise, please provide your feedback.
   126	
   127	your input here: No need to edit
   128	
   129	name: ReviewerAgent
   130	path: [{Writer Multi-Agent} {WriterAgent} {ReviewerAgent} {WriterAgent} {ReviewerAgent}]
   131	action: exit
   132	```
   133	
   134	This trace demonstrates:
   135	- **Initial generation**: The Writer Agent creates a serious poem about potatoes
   136	- **Human feedback**: The user requests a more humorous tone
   137	- **Iterative improvement**: The Writer Agent incorporates the feedback and creates a funnier version
   138	- **Workflow completion**: The user approves the revised version, ending the process
   139	
   140	The path notation shows the hierarchical agent structure and how the workflow progresses through multiple iterations.
   141	
   142	## Implementation Details
   143	
   144	### Agent Architecture
   145	- **WriterAgent**: Uses `adk.NewChatModelAgent` with specific instructions for poem writing
   146	- **ReviewAgent**: Custom agent implementing the `adk.Agent` interface with interrupt/resume logic
   147	- **LoopAgent**: Wraps both agents using `adk.NewLoopAgent` to create the multi-agent workflow
   148	
   149	### State Management
   150	- The `FeedbackInfo` struct maintains:
   151	  - `OriginalContent`: The content being reviewed
   152	  - `Feedback`: Human feedback for improvements
   153	  - `NoNeedToEdit`: Flag indicating content is satisfactory
   154	
   155	### Interrupt/Resume Logic
   156	- Uses `adk.StatefulInterrupt()` to pause execution and request human input while preserving state
   157	- Implements `Resume()` method to handle different resume scenarios
   158	- Supports both feedback-based iteration and workflow completion
   159	
   160	## Use Cases
   161	
   162	This pattern is ideal for:
   163	- Content creation and refinement (writing, design, code generation)
   164	- Quality assurance workflows
   165	- Collaborative editing processes
   166	- Any scenario requiring human judgment and iterative improvement
   167	
   168	The implementation demonstrates how complex human-in-the-loop workflows can be built using the Eino framework's interrupt and resume capabilities.

    17	package main
    18	
    19	import (
    20		"context"
    21		"fmt"
    22		"log"
    23		"time"
    24	
    25		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
    26		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/callbacks"
    27	
    28		"github.com/cloudwego/eino-examples/adk/common/model"
    29		"github.com/cloudwego/eino-examples/adk/common/prints"
    30		"github.com/cloudwego/eino-examples/adk/common/trace"
    31	)
    32	
    33	func main() {
    34		ctx := context.Background()
    35	
    36		callbacks.AppendGlobalHandlers(model.GetInputLoggerCallback())
    37	
    38		traceCloseFn, startSpanFn := trace.AppendCozeLoopCallbackIfConfigured(ctx)
    39		defer traceCloseFn(ctx)
    40	
    41		sv, err := buildSupervisor(ctx)
    42		if err != nil {
    43			log.Fatalf("build supervisor failed: %v", err)
    44		}
    45	
    46		query := "find US and New York state GDP in 2024. what % of US GDP was New York state?"
    47	
    48		runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{
    49			Agent:           sv,
    50			EnableStreaming: true,
    51		})
    52	
    53		ctx, endSpanFn := startSpanFn(ctx, "Supervisor", query)
    54	
    55		iter := runner.Query(ctx, query)
    56	
    57		fmt.Println("\nuser query: ", query)
    58	
    59		var lastMessage adk.Message
    60		for {
    61			event, hasEvent := iter.Next()
    62			if !hasEvent {
    63				break
    64			}
    65	
    66			prints.Event(event)
    67	
    68			if event.Output != nil {
    69				if msg, _, getErr := adk.GetMessage(event); getErr == nil {
    70					lastMessage = msg
    71				}
    72			}
    73		}
    74	
    75		endSpanFn(ctx, lastMessage)
    76	
    77		// wait for all span to be ended
    78		time.Sleep(5 * time.Second)
    79	}

   275	
   276	        - a research agent. Assign research-related tasks to this agent
   277	        - a math agent. Assign math-related tasks to this agent
   278	        Assign work to one agent at a time, do not call agents in parallel.
   279	        Do not do any work yourself.`,
   280			Model: m,
   281			ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{
   282				ToolsNodeConfig: compose.ToolsNodeConfig{
   283					UnknownToolsHandler: func(ctx context.Context, name, input string) (string, error) {
   284						return fmt.Sprintf("unknown tool: %s", name), nil
   285					},
   286				},
   287			},
   288			Exit: &adk.ExitTool{},
   289		})
   290		if err != nil {
   291			return nil, err
   292		}
   293	
   294		searchAgent, err := buildSearchAgent(ctx)
   295		if err != nil {
   296			return nil, err
   297		}
   298		mathAgent, err := buildMathAgent(ctx)
   299		if err != nil {
   300			return nil, err
   301		}
   302	
   303		return supervisor.New(ctx, &supervisor.Config{
   304			Supervisor: sv,
   305			SubAgents:  []adk.Agent{searchAgent, mathAgent},
   306		})
   307	}

1	This project implements a simple manus agent using the Eino framework, inspired by the excellent work of the [OpenManus](https://github.com/mannaandpoem/OpenManus).
     2	
     3	
     4	
     5	agent structure:

1	# Human-in-the-Loop: Supervisor Pattern with Approval
     2	
     3	This example demonstrates the **Supervisor** multi-agent pattern combined with the **Approval** human-in-the-loop pattern.
     4	
     5	It showcases how to build a hierarchical multi-agent system where a supervisor coordinates specialized sub-agents, and sensitive operations (like fund transfers) require explicit user approval before execution.
     6	
     7	## How It Works
     8	
     9	1. **Supervisor Architecture**: A financial advisor supervisor manages two specialized sub-agents:
    10	   - **account_agent**: Handles account-related queries like checking balances
    11	   - **transaction_agent**: Handles financial transactions like fund transfers
    12	
    13	2. **Approvable Tool**: The `transaction_agent` has a `transfer_funds` tool wrapped in `InvokableApprovableTool`. This ensures that before any fund transfer is executed, the user must explicitly approve it.
    14	
    15	3. **Workflow**:
    16	   - User requests an action (e.g., "Check balance and transfer $500")
    17	   - Supervisor delegates to `account_agent` for balance check
    18	   - Supervisor delegates to `transaction_agent` for the transfer
    19	   - When `transfer_funds` is called, an **interrupt** is triggered
    20	   - User approves or denies the transaction
    21	   - Agent resumes and completes (or cancels) the operation
    22	
    23	4. **Targeted Resume**: After user input, `runner.ResumeWithParams` is called with the approval result, allowing the agent to continue execution.
    24	
    25	## Practical Example
    26	
    27	Here's what the approval flow looks like:
    28	
    29	```
    30	========================================
    31	User Query: Check my checking account balance, and then transfer $500 from checking to savings account.
    32	========================================
    33	
    34	name: financial_supervisor
    35	path: [{financial_supervisor}]
    36	action: transfer to account_agent
    37	
    38	name: account_agent
    39	path: [{financial_supervisor} {account_agent}]
    40	tool name: check_balance
    41	arguments: {"account_id":"checking"}
    42	
    43	name: account_agent
    44	path: [{financial_supervisor} {account_agent}]
    45	tool response: {"account_id":"checking","balance":5000,"currency":"USD"}
    46	
    47	name: financial_supervisor
    48	path: [{financial_supervisor}]
    49	action: transfer to transaction_agent
    50	
    51	name: transaction_agent
    52	path: [{financial_supervisor} {transaction_agent}]
    53	tool name: transfer_funds
    54	arguments: {"from_account":"checking","to_account":"savings","amount":500,"currency":"USD"}
    55	
    56	========================================
    57	APPROVAL REQUIRED
    58	========================================
    59	tool 'transfer_funds' interrupted with arguments '{"from_account":"checking","to_account":"savings","amount":500,"currency":"USD"}', waiting for your approval, please answer with Y/N
    60	
    61	Approve this transaction? (Y/N): Y
    62	
    63	========================================
    64	Resuming execution...
    65	========================================
    66	
    67	name: transaction_agent
    68	path: [{financial_supervisor} {transaction_agent}]
    69	tool response: {"transaction_id":"TXN-2025-001234","status":"completed",...}
    70	```
    71	
    72	This trace demonstrates:
    73	- **Hierarchical Delegation**: Supervisor routes tasks to appropriate sub-agents
    74	- **Balance Check**: Account agent retrieves balance without approval
    75	- **Approval Required**: Transfer operation triggers an interrupt for user confirmation
    76	- **Targeted Resume**: After approval, the transaction completes
    77	
    78	## How to Configure Environment Variables
    79	
    80	Before running the example, you need to set up the required environment variables for the LLM API. You have two options:
    81	
    82	### Option 1: OpenAI-Compatible Configuration
    83	```bash
    84	export OPENAI_API_KEY="{your api key}"
    85	export OPENAI_BASE_URL="{your model base url}"
    86	# Only configure this if you are using Azure-like LLM providers
    87	export OPENAI_BY_AZURE=true
    88	# 'gpt-4o' is just an example, configure the model name provided by your LLM provider
    89	export OPENAI_MODEL="gpt-4o-2024-05-13"
    90	```
    91	
    92	### Option 2: ARK Configuration
    93	```bash
    94	export MODEL_TYPE="ark"
    95	export ARK_API_KEY="{your ark api key}"
    96	export ARK_MODEL="{your ark model name}"
    97	```
    98	
    99	Alternatively, you can create a `.env` file in the project root with these variables.
   100	
   101	## How to Run
   102	
   103	Ensure you have your environment variables set (e.g., for the LLM API key). Then, run the following command from the root of the `eino-examples` repository:
   104	
   105	```sh
   106	go run ./adk/human-in-the-loop/5_supervisor
   107	```
   108	
   109	You will see the supervisor coordinating between agents, and when a fund transfer is attempted, you'll be prompted to approve or deny the transaction.
   110	
   111	## Workflow Diagram
   112	
   113	```mermaid
   114	graph TD
   115	    A[User Request] --> B{Financial Supervisor};
   116	    B --> C[Delegate to account_agent];
   117	    C --> D[Check Balance];
   118	    D --> E[Return Balance];
   119	    E --> B;
   120	    B --> F[Delegate to transaction_agent];
   121	    F --> G{transfer_funds Tool};
   122	    G --> H[Interrupt: Approval Required];
   123	    H --> I{User Input};
   124	    I -- "Y (Approve)" --> J[Resume: Approved];
   125	    J --> K[Transfer Executed];
   126	    K --> L[Final Response];
   127	    I -- "N (Deny)" --> M[Resume: Denied];
   128	    M --> N[Transfer Cancelled];
   129	    N --> L;
   130	```

    17	package main
    18	
    19	import (
    20		"context"
    21		"fmt"
    22		"os"

    25	
    26		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
    27		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/supervisor"

    37	
    38	type rateLimitedModel struct {
    39		m     model.ToolCallingChatModel
    40		delay time.Duration
    41	}
    42	
    43	func (r *rateLimitedModel) WithTools(tools []*schema.ToolInfo) (model.ToolCallingChatModel, error) {
    44		newM, err := r.m.WithTools(tools)
    45		if err != nil {
    46			return nil, err
    47		}
    48		return &rateLimitedModel{newM, r.delay}, nil
    49	}
    50	
    51	func (r *rateLimitedModel) Generate(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message, opts ...model.Option) (*schema.Message, error) {
    52		time.Sleep(r.delay)
    53		return r.m.Generate(ctx, input, opts...)
    54	}
    55	
    56	func (r *rateLimitedModel) Stream(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message, opts ...model.Option) (*schema.StreamReader[*schema.Message], error) {
    57		time.Sleep(r.delay)
    58		return r.m.Stream(ctx, input, opts...)
    59	}
    60	
    61	func getRateLimitDelay() time.Duration {
    62		delayMs := os.Getenv("RATE_LIMIT_DELAY_MS")
    63		if delayMs == "" {
    64			return 0
    65		}
    66		ms, err := strconv.Atoi(delayMs)
    67		if err != nil {
    68			return 0
    69		}
    70		return time.Duration(ms) * time.Millisecond
    71	}
    72	
    73	func newRateLimitedModel() model.ToolCallingChatModel {
    74		delay := getRateLimitDelay()
    75		if delay == 0 {
    76			return commonModel.NewChatModel()
    77		}
    78		return &rateLimitedModel{
    79			m:     commonModel.NewChatModel(),
    80			delay: delay,
    81		}
    82	}
    83	
    84	func buildAccountAgent(ctx context.Context) (adk.Agent, error) {
    85		m := newRateLimitedModel()
    86	
    87		type balanceReq struct {
    88			AccountID string `json:"account_id" jsonschema_description:"The account ID to check balance for"`
    89		}
    90	
    91		type balanceResp struct {
    92			AccountID string  `json:"account_id"`
    93			Balance   float64 `json:"balance"`
    94			Currency  string  `json:"currency"`
    95		}
    96	
    97		checkBalance := func(ctx context.Context, req *balanceReq) (*balanceResp, error) {
    98			balances := map[string]float64{
    99				"checking": 5000.00,
   100				"savings":  15000.00,
   101				"main":     5000.00,
   102			}
   103			balance, ok := balances[req.AccountID]
   104			if !ok {
   105				balance = 1000.00
   106			}
   107			return &balanceResp{
   108				AccountID: req.AccountID,
   109				Balance:   balance,
   110				Currency:  "USD",
   111			}, nil
   112		}
   113	
   114		balanceTool, err := utils.InferTool("check_balance", "Check the balance of a specific account", checkBalance)
   115		if err != nil {
   116			return nil, err
   117		}
   118	
   119		return adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   120			Name:        "account_agent",
   121			Description: "the agent responsible for checking account information and balances",
   122			Instruction: `You are an account information agent.
   123	
   124	INSTRUCTIONS:
   125	- Assist ONLY with account-related queries like checking balances
   126	- Use the check_balance tool to get account information
   127	- After you're done with your tasks, respond to the supervisor directly
   128	- Respond ONLY with the results of your work, do NOT include ANY other text.`,
   129			Model: m,
   130			ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{
   131				ToolsNodeConfig: compose.ToolsNodeConfig{
   132					Tools: []tool.BaseTool{balanceTool},
   133				},
   134			},
   135		})
   136	}
   137	
   138	func buildTransactionAgent(ctx context.Context) (adk.Agent, error) {
   139		m := newRateLimitedModel()
   140	
   141		type transferReq struct {
   142			FromAccount string  `json:"from_account" jsonschema_description:"Source account ID"`
   143			ToAccount   string  `json:"to_account" jsonschema_description:"Destination account ID"`
   144			Amount      float64 `json:"amount" jsonschema_description:"Amount to transfer"`
   145			Currency    string  `json:"currency" jsonschema_description:"Currency code (e.g., USD)"`
   146		}
   147	
   148		type transferResp struct {
   149			TransactionID string  `json:"transaction_id"`
   150			Status        string  `json:"status"`
   151			FromAccount   string  `json:"from_account"`
   152			ToAccount     string  `json:"to_account"`
   153			Amount        float64 `json:"amount"`
   154			Currency      string  `json:"currency"`
   155			Message       string  `json:"message"`
   156		}
   157	
   158		transfer := func(ctx context.Context, req *transferReq) (*transferResp, error) {
   159			return &transferResp{
   160				TransactionID: "TXN-2025-001234",
   161				Status:        "completed",
   162				FromAccount:   req.FromAccount,
   163				ToAccount:     req.ToAccount,
   164				Amount:        req.Amount,
   165				Currency:      req.Currency,
   166				Message:       fmt.Sprintf("Successfully transferred %.2f %s from %s to %s", req.Amount, req.Currency, req.FromAccount, req.ToAccount),
   167			}, nil
   168		}
   169	
   170		transferTool, err := utils.InferTool("transfer_funds", "Transfer funds between accounts. This is a sensitive operation that requires user approval.", transfer)
   171		if err != nil {
   172			return nil, err
   173		}
   174	
   175		return adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   176			Name:        "transaction_agent",
   177			Description: "the agent responsible for executing financial transactions like fund transfers",
   178			Instruction: `You are a transaction processing agent.
   179	
   180	INSTRUCTIONS:
   181	- Assist ONLY with transaction-related tasks like fund transfers
   182	- Use the transfer_funds tool to execute transfers
   183	- The transfer_funds tool requires user approval before execution
   184	- After you're done with your tasks, respond to the supervisor directly
   185	- Respond ONLY with the results of your work, do NOT include ANY other text.`,
   186			Model: m,
   187			ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{
   188				ToolsNodeConfig: compose.ToolsNodeConfig{
   189					Tools: []tool.BaseTool{
   190						&tool2.InvokableApprovableTool{InvokableTool: transferTool},
   191					},
   192				},
   193			},
   194		})
   195	}
   196	
   197	func buildFinancialSupervisor(ctx context.Context) (adk.Agent, error) {
   198		m := newRateLimitedModel()
   199	
   200		sv, err := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
   201			Name:        "financial_supervisor",
   202			Description: "the supervisor agent responsible for coordinating financial tasks",
   203			Instruction: `You are a financial advisor supervisor managing two agents:
   204	
   205	- an account_agent: Assign account-related tasks to this agent (checking balances, account info)
   206	- a transaction_agent: Assign transaction-related tasks to this agent (fund transfers, payments)
   207	
   208	INSTRUCTIONS:
   209	- Analyze the user's request and delegate to the appropriate agent
   210	- For requests involving both checking balances AND making transfers, first delegate to account_agent, then to transaction_agent
   211	- Assign work to one agent at a time, do not call agents in parallel
   212	- Do not do any work yourself - always delegate to the appropriate agent
   213	- After all tasks are complete, summarize the results for the user`,
   214			Model: m,
   215			Exit:  &adk.ExitTool{},
   216		})
   217		if err != nil {
   218			return nil, err
   219		}
   220	
   221		accountAgent, err := buildAccountAgent(ctx)
   222		if err != nil {
   223			return nil, err
   224		}
   225		transactionAgent, err := buildTransactionAgent(ctx)
   226		if err != nil {
   227			return nil, err
   228		}
   229	
   230		return supervisor.New(ctx, &supervisor.Config{
   231			Supervisor: sv,
   232			SubAgents:  []adk.Agent{accountAgent, transactionAgent},
   233		})
   234	}

    77		return a

    22	
    23		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
    24		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool"
    25		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils"
    26		"github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose"
    27	
    28		"github.com/cloudwego/eino-examples/adk/common/model"
    29	)
    30	
    31	func NewMainAgent() adk.Agent {
    32		a, err := adk.NewChatModelAgent(context.Background(), &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
    33			Name:        "main_agent",
    34			Description: "Main agent that attempts to solve the user's task.",
    35			Instruction: `You are the main agent responsible for solving the user's task. 
    36	Provide a comprehensive solution based on the given requirements. 
    37	Focus on delivering accurate and complete results.`,
    38			Model: model.NewChatModel(),
    39		})
    40		if err != nil {
    41			log.Fatal(err)
    42		}
    43		return a
    44	}
    45	
    46	func NewCritiqueAgent() adk.Agent {
    47		exitAndSummarizeTool, err := utils.InferTool("exit_and_summarize", "exit from the loop and provide a final summary response",
    48			func(ctx context.Context, req *exitAndSummarize) (string, error) {
    49				_ = adk.SendToolGenAction(ctx, "exit_and_summarize", adk.NewBreakLoopAction("critique_agent"))
    50				return req.Summary, nil
    51			})
    52		if err != nil {
    53			log.Fatalf("create tool failed, name=%v, err=%v", "exit_and_summarize", err)
    54		}
    55		a, err := adk.NewChatModelAgent(context.Background(), &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
    56			Name:        "critique_agent",
    57			Description: "Critique agent that reviews the main agent's work and provides feedback.",
    58			Instruction: `You are a critique agent responsible for reviewing the main agent's work.
    59	Analyze the provided solution for accuracy, completeness, and quality.
    60	If you find issues or areas for improvement, provide specific feedback.
    61	If the work is satisfactory, call the 'exit_and_summarize' tool and provide a final summary response.`,
    62			Model: model.NewChatModel(),
    63			ToolsConfig: adk.ToolsConfig{
    64				ToolsNodeConfig: compose.ToolsNodeConfig{
    65					Tools: []tool.BaseTool{
    66						exitAndSummarizeTool,
    67					},
    68				},
    69				ReturnDirectly: map[string]bool{
    70					"exit_and_summarize": true,
    71				},
    72			},
    73		})
    74		if err != nil {
    75			log.Fatalf("create agent failed, name=%v, err=%v", "critique_agent", err)
    76		}
    77		return a
    78	}
    79	
    80	type exitAndSummarize struct {
    81		Summary string `json:"summary" jsonschema_description:"final summary of the solution"`
    82	}

    32	func main() {

    35		traceCloseFn, startSpanFn := trace.AppendCozeLoopCallbackIfConfigured(ctx)
    36		defer traceCloseFn(ctx)
    37	
    38		a, err := adk.NewLoopAgent(ctx, &adk.LoopAgentConfig{
    39			Name:          "reflection_agent",
    40			Description:   "Reflection agent with main and critique agent for iterative task solving.",
    41			SubAgents:     []adk.Agent{subagents.NewMainAgent(), subagents.NewCritiqueAgent()},
    42			MaxIterations: 5,
    43		})
    44		if err != nil {
    45			log.Fatal(err)
    46		}
    47	
    48		query := "briefly introduce what a multimodal embedding model is."
    49		ctx, endSpanFn := startSpanFn(ctx, "ReflectionAgents", query)
    50	
    51		runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{
    52			EnableStreaming: true, // you can disable streaming here
    53			Agent:           a,
    54		})
    55	
    56		iter := runner.Query(ctx, query)
    57	
    58		var lastMessage adk.Message
    59	
    60		for {
    61			event, ok := iter.Next()
    62			if !ok {
    63				break
    64			}
    65			if event.Err != nil {
    66				fmt.Printf("Error: %v\n", event.Err)
    67				break
    68			}
    69	
    70			prints.Event(event)
    71			if event.Output != nil {
    72				if msg, _, getErr := adk.GetMessage(event); getErr == nil {
    73					lastMessage = msg
    74				}
    75			}
    76		}
    77	
    78		endSpanFn(ctx, lastMessage)
    79		time.Sleep(20 * time.Second)
    80	}

现在我对所有 Agent 有了更全面的了解。让我整理完整的 Agent 列表：

---

## Eino 框架内置 Agent 完整列表

### 一、ADK 包内置 Agent

| Agent | 路径 | 功能描述 |
|-------|------|---------|
| **ChatModelAgent** | `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk` | 基础 ReAct Agent，支持中间件扩展 |
| **DeepAgent** | `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep` | 预构建 Agent，内置 WriteTodos + FileSystem |
| **LoopAgent** | `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk` | 循环执行多个 SubAgent，直到达到终止条件 |
| **SupervisorAgent** | `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/supervisor` | 主从式多 Agent 协调，Supervisor 分配任务给 SubAgents |

---

### 二、Flow 包内置 Agent

| Agent | 路径 | 功能描述 |
|-------|------|---------|
| **ReactAgent** | `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/react` | 经典 ReAct 循环 Agent |
| **PlanExecuteAgent** | `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/plan_execute` | Plan → Execute → Replan 模式 |
| **HostMultiAgent** | `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/host` | Host + Specialists 多专家协作 |
| **ManusAgent** | `examples/flow/agent/manus` | 浏览器 + 命令行工具 Agent |
| **Deer-Go** | `examples/flow/agent/deer-go` | 自定义多 Agent 实现 |

---

## 详细介绍

### 1. LoopAgent（循环执行 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk`

**功能**: 依次循环执行多个 SubAgent，直到达到最大迭代次数或某个 Agent 返回终止信号。

```go
agent, _ := adk.NewLoopAgent(ctx, &adk.LoopAgentConfig{
    Name:          "reflection_agent",
    Description:   "Reflection agent with main and critique agent",
    SubAgents:     []adk.Agent{mainAgent, critiqueAgent}, // 依次执行
    MaxIterations: 5,  // 最大循环次数
})
```

**典型场景**: 
- **自我反思**: MainAgent 生成 → CritiqueAgent 评审 → 循环优化
- **迭代改进**: 不断迭代直到满意为止

**工作流程**:
```
用户请求 → Agent1 → Agent2 → Agent3 → 检查终止条件
                ↑___________________| (循环)
```

---

### 2. SupervisorAgent（主从式多 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/supervisor`

**功能**: Supervisor 作为中央协调器，动态分配任务给 SubAgents。

```go
import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/supervisor"

// 1. 创建 Supervisor（协调者）
sv, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
    Name:        "supervisor",
    Instruction: "You are a supervisor managing multiple agents...",
    Model:       cm,
    Exit:        &adk.ExitTool{}, // 用于终止任务
})

// 2. 创建 SubAgents（专家）
researchAgent, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
    Name:        "research_agent",
    Description: "Search the internet for info",
    // ...
})

// 3. 组合成 SupervisorAgent
agent, _ := supervisor.New(ctx, &supervisor.Config{
    Supervisor: sv,                           // 中央协调者
    SubAgents:  []adk.Agent{researchAgent, mathAgent}, // 专家列表
})
```

**典型场景**:
- 多领域专家协作（研究、写作、计算等）
- 任务分发和协调

**工作流程**:
```
用户请求 → Supervisor（路由决策）
              ↓
        ┌─────┼─────┐
        ↓     ↓     ↓
     Agent1 Agent2 Agent3  （串行执行，非并行）
        ↓     ↓     ↓
        └─────┴─────┘
              ↓
          Supervisor（汇总结果）
```

---

### 3. LayeredSupervisor（层级 Supervisor）

**路径**: `examples/adk/multiagent/layered-supervisor`

**功能**: 多层级 Supervisor 架构，Supervisor 可以嵌套 Supervisor。

```go
// 底层专家 Agent
subtractAgent := buildSubtractAgent(ctx)
multiplyAgent := buildMultiplyAgent(ctx)
divideAgent := buildDivideAgent(ctx)

// 中层 Math Supervisor
mathSupervisor, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelAgentConfig{
    Name:        "math_agent",
    Instruction: "You manage subtract, multiply, divide agents...",
    Model:       cm,
})
mathAgent, _ := supervisor.New(ctx, &supervisor.Config{
    Supervisor: mathSupervisor,
    SubAgents:  []adk.Agent{subtractAgent, multiplyAgent, divideAgent},
})

// 顶层 Supervisor
topSupervisor, _ := adk.NewChatModelAgent(ctx, &adk.ChatModelConfig{
    Name:        "supervisor",
    Instruction: "You manage research and math agents...",
    Model:       cm,
    Exit:        &adk.ExitTool{},
})
agent, _ := supervisor.New(ctx, &supervisor.Config{
    Supervisor: topSupervisor,
    SubAgents:  []adk.Agent{researchAgent, mathAgent}, // mathAgent 本身也是 Supervisor
})
```

**典型场景**:
- 大型复杂系统（如公司组织架构）
- 需要分层管理的任务

**架构图**:
```
                    Top Supervisor
                    /            \
            Research Agent    Math Supervisor (中层)
                              /      |      \
                         Subtract Multiply Divide (底层)
```

---

### 4. PlanExecuteAgent（规划执行 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/plan_execute`

**功能**: 先规划后执行，支持 Replan。

```go
import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/plan_execute"

// 构建规划器
planner := plan_execute.NewPlanner(chatModel, tools)

// 构建执行器
executor := plan_execute.NewExecutor(chatModel, tools)

// 组合成 Agent
agent := plan_execute.NewAgent(planner, executor)
```

**工作流程**:
```
用户请求 → Planner（分解任务）
              ↓
          [Task1, Task2, Task3]
              ↓
         Executor（依次执行）
              ↓
          Replanner（如需重新规划）
```

---

### 5. HostMultiAgent（主从多专家 Agent）

**路径**: `github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/host`

**功能**: Host 作为入口，Specialists 处理特定领域任务。

```go
import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/flow/agent/multiagent/host"

hostMA, _ := host.NewMultiAgent(ctx, &host.MultiAgentConfig{
    Host: host.Host{
        ChatModel:    chatModel,
        SystemPrompt: "You are a coordinator...",
    },
    Specialists: []*host.Specialist{
        {
            Name:        "Writer",
            Description: "Writes journal entries",
            Agent:       writerAgent,
        },
        {
            Name:        "Reader",
            Description: "Reads journal entries",
            Agent:       readerAgent,
        },
    },
})
```

---

### 6. ManusAgent（浏览器 + 命令行 Agent）

**路径**: `examples/flow/agent/manus`

**功能**: 使用浏览器和命令行工具的 Agent。

**特点**:
- 浏览器操作（搜索、点击、输入等）
- 命令行工具执行
- 适合需要 Web 交互的任务

---

### 7. Deer-Go（自定义多 Agent）

**路径**: `examples/flow/agent/deer-go`

**功能**: 示例性的多 Agent 实现，展示如何自定义 Agent 组合。

---

## Agent 选择指南

| 场景 | 推荐 Agent |
|------|-----------|
| 简单工具调用 | ChatModelAgent / ReactAgent |
| 需要迭代优化（自我反思） | LoopAgent |
| 多专家协作（并行或串行） | SupervisorAgent |
| 复杂多层级任务 | LayeredSupervisor |
| 需要任务规划 + 执行 | PlanExecuteAgent |
| 需要文件系统 + 任务管理 | DeepAgent |
| 需要 Web 交互 | ManusAgent |

---

## 架构对比图

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                           ADK 包 Agent                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                     │
│  ChatModelAgent          单 Agent + Tools                          │
│       ↓                                                             │
│  DeepAgent                ChatModelAgent + WriteTodos + FileSystem  │
│       ↓                                                             │
│  LoopAgent                SubAgent1 → SubAgent2 → ... → 循环        │
│       ↓                                                             │
│  SupervisorAgent          Supervisor → SubAgents (串行)             │
│       ↓                                                             │
│  LayeredSupervisor        Supervisor → Supervisor → SubAgents       │
│                                                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                          Flow 包 Agent                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                     │
│  ReactAgent               Reasoning → Action → Observation 循环    │
│       ↓                                                             │
│  PlanExecuteAgent         Plan → Execute → Replan                  │
│       ↓                                                             │
│  HostMultiAgent           Host → Specialists                       │
│       ↓                                                             │
│  ManusAgent               Browser + CLI Tools                      │
│                                                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
